text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the tryouts arrives. All the participating Umamusume busy
themselves warming up, hoping to show their true prowess to
prospective trainers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are filled to the brim with their fans and friends alike,
ready to cheer them on. Among them are the sharp-eyed trainers,
eager to scout the next star.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fangirl
text_block_list.text: Ryaaan! You've got this in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fanboy
text_block_list.text: Show 'em what those legs can do! Make them eat your dust!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, thanks, guys! Don't worry, I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Wow, someone's as popular as ever.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I just go for runs around the school a lot, so I naturally bump
into a lot of people. Never hurts to say hello to someone you see
every day!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, and doing that is what got all these people to come out for
your big day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit embarrassing when you put it that way... But I can't say I
don't appreciate it! Better make it worth their while!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that goes for me too! I won't lose to you! ...Even if I'm not
taking part in the tryouts this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, we'll have to save our head-to-head battle for some other
time! Anyway, I better head down to the track. See you soon, Ines!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Knock 'em dead, Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the stands, I see Mejiro Ryan walk onto the track and start
prepping for the race among the other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: This is it! How far will my legs take me today? Hehe, I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What are you laughing about? This is an important race here, which some of us are actually taking seriously.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah... S-sorry!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hey... Sorry about her. She's from a pretty famous family, so she's
worried about making them proud.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Making her... family proud...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And with that, every Umamusume is at the starting gate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: (Making them proud...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bam!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Ah, crud!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: What's this?! Mejiro Ryan leaves the gate late!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff! Nngh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fanboy
text_block_list.text: Come on, Ryaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan Fangirl
text_block_list.text: That's it! You can still catch up!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And we've reached the final stretch! Mejiro Ryan has managed to
recover from her delayed start and made it all the way to second
place! Will she make it to first?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ah, the racer in first is... the one from before...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
They're approaching the finish line! Ryan's gaining speed and
catching up fast! Will she make it?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And... It's no use! The front runner crosses the finish line, with Mejiro
Ryan coming in a close second!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: It's just... something's off about Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Her running form was different from usual. It was missing her
usual energy.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ah, McQueen! I didn't know you were here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll be running in the next tryouts, so it is only natural that I be here to
prepare myself. But never mind that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I think I need to have a talk with Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! W-wait for me! I wanna talk to her too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro McQueen makes her way to Ryan, Ines Fujin and I trail
behind.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Ines, McQueen, and... the trainer from before? What's going
on?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
That's what we'd like to know! What's wrong, Ryan? That race wasn't
like you at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I-I just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I guess the tryouts weren't as easy as I thought. The rest of the
runners were super serious. I bet they were trying hard to make a
good impression.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Their passion won out in the end. I mean... running's just another way
for me to do what I love—exercise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any big dreams or reasons to run. I'm just... practicing my
hobby.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wh-why would you say that! You train harder than anybody I know!
No way you're doing all that for a simple hobby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, what I mean is... I-I was so busy preparing my body, I forgot to
prepare my spirit too. Guess I'll have to work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Why did you come to Tracen Academy in the first place?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-why? That's...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry. Perhaps that was an insensitive question. I shall be on my
way.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: What?! McQueen, wait!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Why... did I come here?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: That really stings coming from you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, a dejected Mejiro Ryan takes her leave before I can talk to
her.
